  "text": "In the sg-evals/kafka--0753c489 repository (Apache Kafka), the Streams DSL and its Processor API equivalents are organized as follows:\n\n## DSL Interface Layer (kstream package)\nThe public DSL interfaces are in `streams/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/streams/kstream/`:\n- `KStream.java` — defines DSL operations: filter, filterNot, map, mapValues, flatMap, flatMapValues, groupBy, groupByKey, merge, peek, branch, etc.\n- `KTable.java` — defines DSL table operations: filter, filterNot, mapValues, groupBy, toStream, etc.\n- `KGroupedStream.java` — grouped stream DSL: aggregate, reduce, count, windowedBy, etc.\n- `KGroupedTable.java` — grouped table DSL: aggregate, reduce, count, etc.\n\n## DSL Implementation Layer (kstream/internals package)\nThe implementations of DSL interfaces are in `streams/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/streams/kstream/internals/`:\n- `KStreamImpl.java` — implements KStream (filter, map, groupBy, etc.) by wrapping Processor API nodes\n- `KTableImpl.java` — implements KTable (filter, mapValues, groupBy, etc.)\n- `KGroupedStreamImpl.java` — implements KGroupedStream\n- `KGroupedTableImpl.java` — implements KGroupedTable\n\n## Internal Processor Implementations\nThese are the Processor API implementations used internally by the DSL, each implementing FixedKeyProcessorSupplier or ProcessorSupplier from the Processor API:\n- `KStreamFilter.java` — filter/filterNot Processor equivalent (implements FixedKeyProcessorSupplier)\n- `KStreamMap.java` — map Processor equivalent (implements ProcessorSupplier)\n- `KStreamMapValues.java` — mapValues Processor equivalent\n- `KStreamFlatMap.java` — flatMap Processor equivalent\n- `KStreamFlatMapValues.java` — flatMapValues Processor equivalent\n- `KStreamPeek.java` — peek Processor equivalent\n- `KStreamBranch.java` — branch Processor equivalent\n- `KStreamAggregate.java` — aggregate Processor for grouped streams\n- `KStreamReduce.java` — reduce Processor for grouped streams\n- `KStreamWindowAggregate.java` — windowed aggregate Processor\n- `KStreamSessionWindowAggregate.java` — session window aggregate Processor\n- `KStreamSlidingWindowAggregate.java` — sliding window aggregate Processor\n- `KStreamPrint.java` — print Processor equivalent\n- `KTableFilter.java` — KTable filter Processor\n- `KTableMapValues.java` — KTable mapValues Processor\n- `KTableAggregate.java` — KTable aggregate Processor\n- `KTableReduce.java` — KTable reduce Processor\n- `KTableRepartitionMap.java` / `KTableRepartitionMapSupplier.java` — repartition map for groupBy\n- `KTableTransformValues.java` — KTable transformValues Processor\n- `ForeachProcessor.java` — foreach terminal Processor\n- `GroupedStreamAggregateBuilder.java` — builder for grouped stream aggregations\n- `InternalStreamsBuilder.java` — builds the topology graph connecting DSL to Processor API\n\n## Graph Layer (kstream/internals/graph)\nThe graph layer represents DSL operations as topology nodes:\n- `ProcessorGraphNode.java` — wraps a ProcessorParameters (i.e., a ProcessorSupplier + name) into the topology graph\n- `ProcessorParameters.java` — holds the ProcessorSupplier that backs each DSL operation\n\n## Processor API (processor/api package)\nThe lower-level Processor API lives in `streams/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/streams/processor/api/`:\n- `Processor.java` — core interface with process(Record) method\n- `ProcessorContext.java` — context providing forward(), getStateStore(), etc.\n- `ProcessorSupplier.java` — factory for Processor instances, can declare state store connections\n- `FixedKeyProcessor.java` — variant that cannot change record keys\n- `FixedKeyProcessorContext.java` — context for fixed-key processors\n- `FixedKeyProcessorSupplier.java` — factory for FixedKeyProcessor instances\n- `ContextualProcessor.java` — abstract base class that holds context as a field\n- `ContextualFixedKeyProcessor.java` — abstract base class for fixed-key contextual processors\n- `Record.java` — immutable record abstraction passed to process()\n- `FixedKeyRecord.java` — fixed-key record variant\n- `ProcessingContext.java` — shared context interface for state store access and forwarding\n- `RecordMetadata.java` — metadata about a record\n\n## Legacy Processor API (processor package)\n- `ProcessorContext.java` — legacy context (deprecated in favor of api.ProcessorContext)\n- `StateStore.java` — state store interface used for custom state management\n- `ConnectedStoreProvider.java` — interface for connecting state stores to processors\n\nFor a team migrating from DSL to Processor API for custom state store management, the key migration path is: implement `Processor` (or `FixedKeyProcessor` for value-only transformations) from `processor/api/`, wire state stores via `ProcessorSupplier.stores()` (implements `ConnectedStoreProvider`), and register using `Topology.addProcessor()` instead of the DSL. The internal implementations (KStreamFilter, KStreamMap, etc.) serve as reference implementations for how the DSL operations translate to Processor API calls."
}

  "text": "In the sg-evals/kafka--0753c489 repository (Apache Kafka), the Streams DSL and its Processor API equivalents are organized as follows:\n\n## DSL Interface Layer (kstream package)\nThe public DSL interfaces are in streams/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/streams/kstream/:\n- KStream.java: defines filter, filterNot, map, mapValues, flatMap, flatMapValues, groupBy, groupByKey, merge, peek, branch, etc.\n- KTable.java: defines filter, filterNot, mapValues, groupBy, toStream, etc.\n- KGroupedStream.java: grouped stream DSL: aggregate, reduce, count, windowedBy, etc.\n- KGroupedTable.java: grouped table DSL: aggregate, reduce, count, etc.\n\n## DSL Implementation Layer (kstream/internals package)\nThe implementations of DSL interfaces are in streams/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/streams/kstream/internals/:\n- KStreamImpl.java: implements KStream (filter, map, groupBy, etc.) by wrapping Processor API nodes\n- KTableImpl.java: implements KTable (filter, mapValues, groupBy, etc.)\n- KGroupedStreamImpl.java: implements KGroupedStream\n- KGroupedTableImpl.java: implements KGroupedTable\n\n## Internal Processor Implementations\nThese are the Processor API implementations used internally by the DSL, each implementing FixedKeyProcessorSupplier or ProcessorSupplier:\n- KStreamFilter.java: filter/filterNot Processor equivalent (implements FixedKeyProcessorSupplier)\n- KStreamMap.java: map Processor equivalent (implements ProcessorSupplier)\n- KStreamMapValues.java: mapValues Processor equivalent\n- KStreamFlatMap.java: flatMap Processor equivalent\n- KStreamFlatMapValues.java: flatMapValues Processor equivalent\n- KStreamPeek.java: peek Processor equivalent\n- KStreamBranch.java: branch Processor equivalent\n- KStreamAggregate.java: aggregate Processor for grouped streams\n- KStreamReduce.java: reduce Processor for grouped streams\n- KStreamWindowAggregate.java: windowed aggregate Processor\n- KStreamSessionWindowAggregate.java: session window aggregate Processor\n- KStreamSlidingWindowAggregate.java: sliding window aggregate Processor\n- KStreamPrint.java: print Processor equivalent\n- KTableFilter.java: KTable filter Processor\n- KTableMapValues.java: KTable mapValues Processor\n- KTableAggregate.java: KTable aggregate Processor\n- KTableReduce.java: KTable reduce Processor\n- KTableRepartitionMap.java / KTableRepartitionMapSupplier.java: repartition map for groupBy\n- KTableTransformValues.java: KTable transformValues Processor\n- ForeachProcessor.java: foreach terminal Processor\n- GroupedStreamAggregateBuilder.java: builder for grouped stream aggregations\n- InternalStreamsBuilder.java: builds the topology graph connecting DSL to Processor API\n\n## Graph Layer (kstream/internals/graph)\n- ProcessorGraphNode.java: wraps a ProcessorParameters into the topology graph\n- ProcessorParameters.java: holds the ProcessorSupplier backing each DSL operation\n\n## Processor API (processor/api package)\nThe lower-level Processor API for migration targets in streams/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/streams/processor/api/:\n- Processor.java: core interface with process(Record) method\n- ProcessorContext.java: context providing forward(), getStateStore(), etc.\n- ProcessorSupplier.java: factory for Processor instances, can declare state store connections\n- FixedKeyProcessor.java: variant that cannot change record keys\n- FixedKeyProcessorContext.java: context for fixed-key processors\n- FixedKeyProcessorSupplier.java: factory for FixedKeyProcessor instances\n- ContextualProcessor.java: abstract base class that holds context as a field\n- ContextualFixedKeyProcessor.java: abstract base class for fixed-key contextual processors\n- Record.java: immutable record abstraction passed to process()\n- FixedKeyRecord.java: fixed-key record variant\n- ProcessingContext.java: shared context interface for state store access and forwarding\n- RecordMetadata.java: metadata about a record\n\n## Legacy Processor API (processor package)\n- ProcessorContext.java: legacy context (deprecated in favor of api.ProcessorContext)\n- StateStore.java: state store interface used for custom state management\n- ConnectedStoreProvider.java: interface for connecting state stores to processors\n\nFor migration from DSL to Processor API for custom state store management: implement Processor (or FixedKeyProcessor for value-only transformations), wire state stores via ProcessorSupplier.stores() (implements ConnectedStoreProvider), and register using Topology.addProcessor() instead of DSL chaining. The internal KStream* and KTable* processor files serve as reference implementations showing exactly how each DSL operation maps to Processor API calls."

  "text": "In the sg-evals/kafka--0753c489 repository (Apache Kafka), the Streams DSL and its Processor API equivalents are organized as follows:\n\n## DSL Interface Layer (kstream package)\nThe public DSL interfaces are in `streams/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/streams/kstream/`:\n- `KStream.java` — defines DSL operations: filter, filterNot, map, mapValues, flatMap, flatMapValues, groupBy, groupByKey, merge, peek, branch, etc.\n- `KTable.java` — defines DSL table operations: filter, filterNot, mapValues, groupBy, toStream, etc.\n- `KGroupedStream.java` — grouped stream DSL: aggregate, reduce, count, windowedBy, etc.\n- `KGroupedTable.java` — grouped table DSL: aggregate, reduce, count, etc.\n\n## DSL Implementation Layer (kstream/internals package)\nThe implementations of DSL interfaces are in `streams/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/streams/kstream/internals/`:\n- `KStreamImpl.java` — implements KStream (filter, map, groupBy, etc.) by wrapping Processor API nodes\n- `KTableImpl.java` — implements KTable (filter, mapValues, groupBy, etc.)\n- `KGroupedStreamImpl.java` — implements KGroupedStream\n- `KGroupedTableImpl.java` — implements KGroupedTable\n\n## Internal Processor Implementations\nThese are the Processor API implementations used internally by the DSL, each implementing FixedKeyProcessorSupplier or ProcessorSupplier from the Processor API:\n- `KStreamFilter.java` — filter/filterNot Processor equivalent (implements FixedKeyProcessorSupplier)\n- `KStreamMap.java` — map Processor equivalent (implements ProcessorSupplier)\n- `KStreamMapValues.java` — mapValues Processor equivalent\n- `KStreamFlatMap.java` — flatMap Processor equivalent\n- `KStreamFlatMapValues.java` — flatMapValues Processor equivalent\n- `KStreamPeek.java` — peek Processor equivalent\n- `KStreamBranch.java` — branch Processor equivalent\n- `KStreamAggregate.java` — aggregate Processor for grouped streams\n- `KStreamReduce.java` — reduce Processor for grouped streams\n- `KStreamWindowAggregate.java` — windowed aggregate Processor\n- `KStreamSessionWindowAggregate.java` — session window aggregate Processor\n- `KStreamSlidingWindowAggregate.java` — sliding window aggregate Processor\n- `KStreamPrint.java` — print Processor equivalent\n- `KTableFilter.java` — KTable filter Processor\n- `KTableMapValues.java` — KTable mapValues Processor\n- `KTableAggregate.java` — KTable aggregate Processor\n- `KTableReduce.java` — KTable reduce Processor\n- `KTableRepartitionMap.java` / `KTableRepartitionMapSupplier.java` — repartition map for groupBy\n- `KTableTransformValues.java` — KTable transformValues Processor\n- `ForeachProcessor.java` — foreach terminal Processor\n- `GroupedStreamAggregateBuilder.java` — builder for grouped stream aggregations\n- `InternalStreamsBuilder.java` — builds the topology graph connecting DSL to Processor API\n\n## Graph Layer (kstream/internals/graph)\nThe graph layer represents DSL operations as topology nodes:\n- `ProcessorGraphNode.java` — wraps a ProcessorParameters (i.e., a ProcessorSupplier + name) into the topology graph\n- `ProcessorParameters.java` — holds the ProcessorSupplier that backs each DSL operation\n\n## Processor API (processor/api package)\nThe lower-level Processor API lives in `streams/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/streams/processor/api/`:\n- `Processor.java` — core interface with process(Record) method\n- `ProcessorContext.java` — context providing forward(), getStateStore(), etc.\n- `ProcessorSupplier.java` — factory for Processor instances, can declare state store connections\n- `FixedKeyProcessor.java` — variant that cannot change record keys\n- `FixedKeyProcessorContext.java` — context for fixed-key processors\n- `FixedKeyProcessorSupplier.java` — factory for FixedKeyProcessor instances\n- `ContextualProcessor.java` — abstract base class that holds context as a field\n- `ContextualFixedKeyProcessor.java` — abstract base class for fixed-key contextual processors\n- `Record.java` — immutable record abstraction passed to process()\n- `FixedKeyRecord.java` — fixed-key record variant\n- `ProcessingContext.java` — shared context interface for state store access and forwarding\n- `RecordMetadata.java` — metadata about a record\n\n## Legacy Processor API (processor package)\n- `ProcessorContext.java` — legacy context (deprecated in favor of api.ProcessorContext)\n- `StateStore.java` — state store interface used for custom state management\n- `ConnectedStoreProvider.java` — interface for connecting state stores to processors\n\nFor a team migrating from DSL to Processor API for custom state store management, the key migration path is: implement `Processor` (or `FixedKeyProcessor` for value-only transformations) from `processor/api/`, wire state stores via `ProcessorSupplier.stores()` (implements `ConnectedStoreProvider`), and register using `Topology.addProcessor()` instead of the DSL. The internal implementations (KStreamFilter, KStreamMap, etc.) serve as reference implementations for how the DSL operations translate to Processor API calls."
}

  "text": "In the sg-evals/kafka--0753c489 repository (Apache Kafka), the Streams DSL and its Processor API equivalents are organized as follows:\n\n## DSL Interface Layer (kstream package)\nThe public DSL interfaces are in `streams/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/streams/kstream/`:\n- `KStream.java` — defines DSL operations: filter, filterNot, map, mapValues, flatMap, flatMapValues, groupBy, groupByKey, merge, peek, branch, etc.\n- `KTable.java` — defines DSL table operations: filter, filterNot, mapValues, groupBy, toStream, etc.\n- `KGroupedStream.java` — grouped stream DSL: aggregate, reduce, count, windowedBy, etc.\n- `KGroupedTable.java` — grouped table DSL: aggregate, reduce, count, etc.\n\n## DSL Implementation Layer (kstream/internals package)\nThe implementations of DSL interfaces are in `streams/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/streams/kstream/internals/`:\n- `KStreamImpl.java` — implements KStream (filter, map, groupBy, etc.) by wrapping Processor API nodes\n- `KTableImpl.java` — implements KTable (filter, mapValues, groupBy, etc.)\n- `KGroupedStreamImpl.java` — implements KGroupedStream\n- `KGroupedTableImpl.java` — implements KGroupedTable\n\n## Internal Processor Implementations\nThese are the Processor API implementations used internally by the DSL, each implementing FixedKeyProcessorSupplier or ProcessorSupplier from the Processor API:\n- `KStreamFilter.java` — filter/filterNot Processor equivalent (implements FixedKeyProcessorSupplier)\n- `KStreamMap.java` — map Processor equivalent (implements ProcessorSupplier)\n- `KStreamMapValues.java` — mapValues Processor equivalent\n- `KStreamFlatMap.java` — flatMap Processor equivalent\n- `KStreamFlatMapValues.java` — flatMapValues Processor equivalent\n- `KStreamPeek.java` — peek Processor equivalent\n- `KStreamBranch.java` — branch Processor equivalent\n- `KStreamAggregate.java` — aggregate Processor for grouped streams\n- `KStreamReduce.java` — reduce Processor for grouped streams\n- `KStreamWindowAggregate.java` — windowed aggregate Processor\n- `KStreamSessionWindowAggregate.java` — session window aggregate Processor\n- `KStreamSlidingWindowAggregate.java` — sliding window aggregate Processor\n- `KStreamPrint.java` — print Processor equivalent\n- `KTableFilter.java` — KTable filter Processor\n- `KTableMapValues.java` — KTable mapValues Processor\n- `KTableAggregate.java` — KTable aggregate Processor\n- `KTableReduce.java` — KTable reduce Processor\n- `KTableRepartitionMap.java` / `KTableRepartitionMapSupplier.java` — repartition map for groupBy\n- `KTableTransformValues.java` — KTable transformValues Processor\n- `ForeachProcessor.java` — foreach terminal Processor\n- `GroupedStreamAggregateBuilder.java` — builder for grouped stream aggregations\n- `InternalStreamsBuilder.java` — builds the topology graph connecting DSL to Processor API\n\n## Graph Layer (kstream/internals/graph)\nThe graph layer represents DSL operations as topology nodes:\n- `ProcessorGraphNode.java` — wraps a ProcessorParameters (i.e., a ProcessorSupplier + name) into the topology graph\n- `ProcessorParameters.java` — holds the ProcessorSupplier that backs each DSL operation\n\n## Processor API (processor/api package)\nThe lower-level Processor API lives in `streams/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/streams/processor/api/`:\n- `Processor.java` — core interface with process(Record) method\n- `ProcessorContext.java` — context providing forward(), getStateStore(), etc.\n- `ProcessorSupplier.java` — factory for Processor instances, can declare state store connections\n- `FixedKeyProcessor.java` — variant that cannot change record keys\n- `FixedKeyProcessorContext.java` — context for fixed-key processors\n- `FixedKeyProcessorSupplier.java` — factory for FixedKeyProcessor instances\n- `ContextualProcessor.java` — abstract base class that holds context as a field\n- `ContextualFixedKeyProcessor.java` — abstract base class for fixed-key contextual processors\n- `Record.java` — immutable record abstraction passed to process()\n- `FixedKeyRecord.java` — fixed-key record variant\n- `ProcessingContext.java` — shared context interface for state store access and forwarding\n- `RecordMetadata.java` — metadata about a record\n\n## Legacy Processor API (processor package)\n- `ProcessorContext.java` — legacy context (deprecated in favor of api.ProcessorContext)\n- `StateStore.java` — state store interface used for custom state management\n- `ConnectedStoreProvider.java` — interface for connecting state stores to processors\n\nFor a team migrating from DSL to Processor API for custom state store management, the key migration path is: implement `Processor` (or `FixedKeyProcessor` for value-only transformations) from `processor/api/`, wire state stores via `ProcessorSupplier.stores()` (implements `ConnectedStoreProvider`), and register using `Topology.addProcessor()` instead of the DSL. The internal implementations (KStreamFilter, KStreamMap, etc.) serve as reference implementations for how the DSL operations translate to Processor API calls."
